_description: Configuration file for Network Sketcher Online Service

version.description: Network Sketcher version. Not used in code; for version management purposes only.

host.description: Bind address for the server. Use 'localhost' for local only, '0.0.0.0' for all interfaces, or a specific IP address.

fqdn.description: FQDN for SSL certificate CN. If null, the certificate CN is determined from the 'host' setting. Set a domain name (e.g., 'sketcher.example.com') to use it as the certificate CN.

port.description: HTTPS port number for the server.

max_file_size_mb.description: Maximum upload file size in megabytes.

subprocess_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for CLI subprocess execution.

heartbeat_timeout.description: Seconds of inactivity before a session is considered expired and its files are cleaned up.

cleanup_interval.description: Interval in seconds between cleanup checks for expired sessions.

parallel_limit.description: Maximum number of diagram generation tasks that can run in parallel.

ssl_cert_path.description: Path to the SSL certificate file (relative to this config file or absolute).

ssl_key_path.description: Path to the SSL private key file (relative to this config file or absolute).

ssl_cert_validity_days.description: Validity period in days for auto-generated self-signed certificates (default: 10 years).

ssl_key_size.description: RSA key size in bits for auto-generated self-signed certificates.

ssl_ciphers.description: OpenSSL cipher string for allowed TLS cipher suites.

access_log_retention_days.description: Number of days to retain access log files. Logs older than this are automatically deleted on date change or server restart.

ai_context_button_label.description: Label text for the AI Context copy-and-open button.

ai_context_button_url.description: URL to open when the AI Context copy-and-open button is clicked.

ai_context_show_commands.description: List of show commands to execute for AI Context File generation. Commands are executed in parallel and results are assembled in order.
